testcase.name: mypy-py3_13-darwin
testcase.failure: src/mhpython/async_tasks/base.py:79: note: By default the bodies of untyped functions are not checked, consider using --check-untyped-defs [annotation-unchecked] src/mhpython/finance/csv_parser.py:86: error: Missing return statement [return] src/mhpython/ddd/base.py:290: error: "DDDEntity" gets multiple values for keyword argument "name" [misc] src/mhpython/finance/pdf_parser.py:155: error: Value of type "dict[Any, Any] | BaseModel" is not indexable [index] src/mhpython/finance/pdf_parser.py:156: error: Value of type "dict[Any, Any] | BaseModel" is not indexable [index] src/mhpython/finance/pdf_parser.py:158: error: Value of type "dict[Any, Any] | BaseModel" is not indexable [index]
